nodes.label: Tests for queryd plugin discovery, selection, capability awareness, and healthz
A plugin whose module requirement is never satisfied.
When the module registry exists but doesn't have the required     module, the pl
strict_plugins=True raises RuntimeError when a plugin is skipped     due to unme
When ENABLE_WRITES=false, write-tool plugins are suppressed even     if discover
When the module registry responds, the schema summary is available.
When the module registry responds, /healthz includes module     versions and act
When the module registry throws TdbError, the service starts     with modules om
strict_plugins=True + unmet requirement → fatal even when     enable_writes=Fals
enable_writes=False + non-strict: skipped plugins are tolerated,     app starts,
